HGSS.671.0001:
Oh? You’re on a big journey to see the
sights? Neat!\f
Let’s be friends!
Can I have your phone number?\f
I want to hear about everything
you’ve seen! [0200,0000]
HGSS.671.0002:
I’ll telephone you if I hear anything
interesting.
HGSS.671.0003: Aww... You won’t be my friend?
HGSS.671.0004:
Let’s be friends!
Can I have your phone number?\f
I want to hear about everything
you’ve seen! [0200,0000]
HGSS.671.0005:
If you’re nearby, just come talk
in person!
HGSS.671.0006:
Oh, you have to hear this.\f
My [0100,000A,0000] is so adorable!
It always wants to nuzzle me!\f
And, and! Um...\f
We beat a wild [0100,000B,0000] with just
one hit a little while ago.\r
We felt sorry for it, though.\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0007:
Oh, you have to hear this.\f
My [0100,000A,0000] is so adorable!
It’s always giving me cute looks!\f
And, and! Uh...\f
We just saw a really gorgeous
[0100,000B,0000].\f
But I was on the phone, so it got away.
It made us really angry!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0008:
Listen, listen!\f
I was listening to the radio in the Ruins
of Alph when an odd broadcast suddenly\r
cut in on the regular show.\r
I wonder what it was. So strange!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0009:
Listen, listen!\f
Don’t you think Falkner of Violet Gym is
cool and handsome?\f
But they say his dad, who’s out training
on the road, is even more cool and\r
handsome than Falkner.\f
I wish I could meet him!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0010:
Listen, listen!\f
Do you know Earl, the teacher who runs
the Pokémon School in Violet?\f
I saw him doing pirouettes while he was
running. It was wildly funny!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0011:
Listen, listen!\f
The Kimono Girls in Ecruteak City don’t
just study dancing!\f
They’re also working to bring back
legendary Pokémon that haven’t\r
appeared in front of humans since long,\r
long ago.\f
That’s amazing isn’t it?\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0012:
Listen, listen!\f
Do you know about Moomoo Milk?\f
You can buy it at Moomoo Farm.
It’s supposed to be good for health\r
and beauty.\f
I really want to try some. I bet it’s
delicious!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0013:
Listen, listen!\f
There’s a Pokémon Salon in Goldenrod
that’s run by two brothers.\f
The older brother is good, but the
younger one really isn’t.\f
But the younger one charges less, and
sometimes does a better job than\r
his brother.\f
Every time I go, I have a hard time
trying to decide whom I should use...\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0014:
Listen, listen!\f
Goldenrod Gym’s Whitney began battling
only a little while ago!\f
But the Pokémon League chose her as a
Gym Leader!\r
I bet she must be totally talented.\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0015:
Listen, listen!\f
Have you ever taken part in a
Bug-Catching Contest at the\r
National Park?\f
I did once, but all I could catch was a
CATERPIE.\f
But guess what! I won with that
CATERPIE. Isn’t that great?\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0016:
Listen, listen!\f
I saw a beautiful [010E,0004,0000]!\f
I wish I could become a beautiful
[010E,0004,0000], too.\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0017:
Listen, listen!\f
Uh... Um... Whoops! I forgot what I was
going to say!\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
HGSS.671.0018:
Hi! Do you have some free time?\f
I’ve got all sorts of time. If you’re
free, would you like to battle?\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
Let me know when you get here!
HGSS.671.0019:
I’ve got too much time on my hands!
Let’s battle right away!\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.671.0020:
Hi, Tania. How are you? This is Liz.
I’m fine, but I’m bored silly!\f
Huh... Wrong number?
Oops! Sorry!
HGSS.671.0021:
Listen, listen!\f
My [0100,000A,0000]...it’s...so pretty...
and...giggle...so awesome...yes...\r
but...very much...eeek!\r
And...lovely...just ravishing...\r
Oh, too much! Hug it... Sleeping...\r
That’s right...pretty... Sigh...\r
So nice...cute...\f
...Oops! Look at the time! I chatted
too long!\f
I’m sorry I took so much of your time!
I love chatting!
